sentences.arabic: جَلَسْتُ فِي مَطْعَمٍ صَغِيرٍ قَرِيبٍ مِنَ الْفُنْدُقِ.
sentences.translation: Sjeo sam u mali restoran blizu hotela.
sentences.translationEn: I sat down in a small restaurant near the hotel.

sentences.arabic: نَاوَلَنِي النَّادِلُ قَائِمَةَ الطَّعَامِ وَانْتَظَرَ طَلَبِي.
sentences.translation: Konobar mi je donio jelovnik i čekao moj narudžbu.
sentences.translationEn: The waiter handed me the menu and waited for my order.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبْتُ شَوْرَبَةَ الْعَدَسِ وَطَبَقَ الْكُشَرِيِّ الْمَشْهُورِ.
sentences.translation: Naručio sam sočivo supu i poznato jelo kušari.
sentences.translationEn: I ordered lentil soup and the famous koshary dish.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَنِي إِذَا كُنْتُ أُرِيدُ شَيْئًا لِلشُّرْبِ فَطَلَبْتُ عَصِيرَ بُرْتُقَالٍ.
sentences.translation: Pitao me da li želim nešto za piće pa sam naručio sok od narandže.
sentences.translationEn: He asked if I wanted something to drink, so I ordered orange juice.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّعَامُ لَذِيذًا وَالسِّعْرُ مَعْقُولًا جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Hrana je bila ukusna, a cijena vrlo razumna.
sentences.translationEn: The food was delicious and the price was very reasonable.
